items.title: Andreessen Horowitz Raises $2.2 Billion to Fund Next Wave of Crypto Startups
items.summary: Andreessen Horowitz's latest fund signals institutional confidence in crypto as the investment landscape shows signs of recovery.

items.title: Space and Time rolls out virtual vaults for institutional onchain lending
items.summary: The data blockchain securing onchain finance projects looks to provide lenders and borrowers with agreement-specific collateral solution.

items.title: Binance changes weekend pricing for commodity TradFi futures
items.summary: Binance will shift to an orderbook-weighted pricing model for commodity perpetual futures during off-hours, potentially changing margin and liquidation behavior.

items.title: Crypto.com’s high-rolling head of marketing to leave after almost six years
items.summary: Steven Kalifowitz will be moving on from his role as CMO, effective June 30, and will then continue on as advisor to the CEO.

items.title: Coinbase cuts 14% of workforce, citing market slump and AI shift
items.summary: Brian Armstrong said Coinbase will flatten management layers and require leaders to work as “player-coaches” under the new structure.

items.title: Bitcoin ‘supercycle’ or bear-market rally? BTC breaking $81K has traders at odds
items.summary: Bitcoin bottom calls grow as analysts target $180,000–$250,000 within a year, fueling debate over whether BTC has resumed its broader bull cycle.

items.title: Consensus Miami Day 1: Sights and sounds
items.summary: Consensus Miami 2026 launched on Tuesday. Stay tuned for updates throughout the day.

items.title: Crypto products post 5th straight week of inflows despite mid-week selloff
items.summary: Crypto ETPs shed $619 million over four days before a $737 million Friday session rescued the week, extending the inflow streak to $4.02 billion across five weeks.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: index jumps 1.3% as all constituents trade higher
items.summary: Internet Computer (ICP) rose 5.2% and Chainlink (LINK) gained 4% since Monday.

items.title: State Street and Galaxy launch tokenized fund to bring cash management onchain
items.summary: The fund lets institutions earn yield on stablecoins while moving cash onchain with round-the-clock access.

items.title: Europe should weigh tokenized SEPA payments, Bank of Italy official says
items.summary: The Bank of Italy’s deputy governor floated the evaluation of tokenized SEPA payments, as the ECB experiments with tokenized digital payment frameworks to avoid stablecoin competition.

items.title: K Wave Media scraps massive bitcoin treasury plan to redirect $485 million to AI
items.summary: The Nasdaq-listed firm raised $500 million to invest in bitcoin. Less than a year later, it is chasing the market's current hot sector of AI.

items.title: Bitcoin absorbed $200 million profit-taking at $80,000 in a bullish sign for BTC
items.summary: Net realized profits hit a one-month high of $207.56 million Sunday as bitcoin crossed $80,000 for the first time since January, with the price holding above the breakout level into Tuesday despite the heavy sell-side flow.

items.title: Bullish to buy transfer agent Equiniti for $4.2B in tokenization push
items.summary: Bullish has agreed to acquire transfer agent Equiniti as more Wall Street participants accelerate their tokenization initiatives to offer 24/7 trading.

items.title: Bitcoin's $81K Rally Comes Amid 66-Day Negative Funding Streak: Here’s Why
items.summary: Shorts have paid a 12% annualized carry for 66 days amid Bitcoin's climb—analysts say the driver is institutional hedging, not fear.

items.title: Dutch users still access prediction markets despite Polymarket ban
items.summary: Polymarket was banned in the Netherlands in February, but Kalshi, Hyperliquid and Interactive Brokers are still offering prediction markets to Dutch users.

items.title: Coinbase Cuts 14% of Staff Amid Crypto 'Down Market,' AI Adoption: CEO
items.summary: The crypto exchange is restructuring around artificial intelligence and flattening its org chart, CEO Brian Armstrong said.

items.title: Standard Chartered expands further into crypto with stake in GSR at $1 billion valuation
items.summary: SC Ventures, Standard Chartered’s venture capital division takes a $150 million stake in crypto trading firm GSR at a valuation of more than $1 billion, according to Bloomberg.

items.title: Andreessen Horowitz raises $2.2 billion in a new fund, saying crypto fundamentals are at an 'all-time high'
